meaning: vt.犯(错误),干(坏事),把...交托给,提交,答应负责
examples: He hit out at public figures who commit adultery.
You don't have to commit yourself now, just think about it.
Those driven by temporary fear almost by definition commit themselves to a program of sell, switch, and buy.
And if you are old enough to commit these crimes, you are old enough to face the punishment.
